# nineyards

> nineyards is a strategic transformation partner for growing companies. We realign brand, operations and digital systems to support structured growth and long-term expansion. Our positioning: "Your Red Right Hand". We are the strategic partner to companies executing top-level transformation.

nineyards works with companies entering a new stage of growth. For many, that stage begins with a bolder brand or website. For our clients, it is about aligning the business behind it. We act as an entrusted strategic partner for sustained, scaled execution, not a one-off vendor.

- Website: https://www.nineyards.pt
- Contact: info@nineyards.pt
- Founder & CEO: Hugo Silva Pereira
- AI branding division (brand.soul OS): https://brandsoul.nineyards.pt/
- Crawler rules: https://www.nineyards.pt/robots.txt

## Leadership

**Hugo Silva Pereira, Founder & CEO.** A recognized brand and transformation leader in Portugal. He began in digital commerce as E-commerce Coordinator at Sport Zone and went on to serve as Head of E-commerce at Prio, building deep experience across retail and the industrial sector. His work centers on revitalizing legacy brands and industries through transformation from within, spanning business strategy, commercial alignment, and communication. An early adopter of AI, Hugo has been building in the field for six years: founding AI projects and companies, investing in several AI ventures, and directing operations across a number of them. He founded nineyards to bring this combination of brand, commercial, and AI expertise to companies executing top-level transformation.

## The Strategic Mandate

Our work is organized around four areas that move a company from its current stage to its next one:

### Brand Fundamentals
Redefining and reimagining the brand to reflect the next stage of the business. This is not cosmetic. It identifies the right concept, positioning and identity for the direction the company intends to pursue. The outcome is a brand built to carry strategic clarity and support expansion with credibility.

### Commercial Alignment
Aligning leadership, messaging and commercial priorities before growth accelerates. This work clarifies how value is defined, presented and sold, removing inconsistencies between strategy, operations and market presence.

### Integrated Digital Systems
Designing and integrating the website, content systems and automation required to support the new direction. The objective is to establish a coherent digital environment capable of supporting scalable growth.

### Operating Model
Establishing the standards and processes that govern how brand and expansion are managed internally. This includes supporting the appointment or recruitment of a responsible lead who maintains direction, while nineyards remains the entrusted strategic partner for sustained, scaled execution.

## Financial Partnerships

Structural change requires commitment. nineyards integrates funding pathways into strategic mandates, working alongside trusted financial and funding partners to support disciplined expansion.

- **Banking partners:** When structural expansion requires financial backing, we coordinate with banking partners (e.g. Bankinter) to align financing with the strategic roadmap and support businesses prepared to scale responsibly.
- **European funding mechanisms:** European funding can support digital transformation, AI integration and SME modernization initiatives. Our funding partners assess eligibility, structure applications and integrate approved funding into the broader strategic plan.

Details: https://www.nineyards.pt/financial-partnerships

## Branding for AI

nineyards delivers AI-native branding through brand.soul OS, our dedicated practice for companies building or repositioning around artificial intelligence.

- brand.soul OS: https://brandsoul.nineyards.pt/

## Selected Work

A curated portfolio demonstrating a commitment to simplicity and purposeful design, across brand & commercial architecture, investment groups, real estate, and AI systems.

### Carlom: Brand & Commercial Architecture (2025)
Strategic repositioning and commercial restructuring of a legacy textile manufacturer following stakeholder transition. nineyards modernized the Carlom brand while preserving its industrial heritage, and installed a structured sub-brand architecture that enabled clearer market segmentation, stronger commercial alignment and expansion into specialized sectors.
https://www.nineyards.pt/project/carlom

### Hartics: Investment Group & Portfolio (2025)
Strategic restructuring of an investment group operating across multiple legacy sectors. nineyards repositioned Hartics through a new corporate identity, portfolio architecture and institutional communication framework designed to reinforce legitimacy, coherence and long-term investment credibility.
https://www.nineyards.pt/project/hartics

### Nort Properties: Brand & Commercial Architecture (2025)
Strategic restructuring of a real estate developer through brand architecture, development positioning, and commercial system redesign. nineyards transformed Nort Properties from a traditional development company into a structured real estate brand ecosystem with independent project identities, direct-to-consumer sales infrastructure and scalable commercial governance.
https://www.nineyards.pt/project/nort-properties

### Orma: Brand Architecture (2025)
Strategic brand and development architecture for a family-led real estate developer. nineyards defined the foundational positioning, communication systems, and project governance principles required to translate Orma's values into a coherent development and market experience across all enterprise launches.
https://www.nineyards.pt/project/orma

### Clínica Dentária Parque da Cidade: AI Automation & Operational Systems (2025)
Implementation of an AI-assisted booking and lead management system for a dental clinic group handling high inbound demand from digital campaigns. nineyards developed a WhatsApp-based AI assistant designed to automate appointment workflows, improve lead handling efficiency, and reduce administrative overload within the clinic operation.
https://www.nineyards.pt/project/clinica-dentaria-parque-da-cidade

### Globital: AI Transformation & Strategic Advisory (2025)
Strategic AI transformation and service architecture restructuring for an international digital consultancy operating across multiple markets. nineyards guided Globital's transition into an AI-enabled operational model through commercial restructuring, AI adoption frameworks, service innovation, and large-scale strategic coordination across international executive teams.
https://www.nineyards.pt/project/globital

### Ekonomista: AI Editorial Systems (2025)
Strategic editorial expansion and AI-powered content system implementation for one of Portugal's major digital publishing platforms. nineyards identified and operationalized a new editorial vertical through a proprietary AI-assisted publishing infrastructure designed to increase content scalability while maintaining governance and editorial validation standards.
https://www.nineyards.pt/project/ekonomista

## Working With Us

If your company is entering a new stage, outline the challenge and the direction ahead. We review each mandate carefully and respond with the appropriate next step. Typical challenges we take on: Repositioning, Expansion, New Leadership, AI Integration, and Structural Realignment.

- Contact: info@nineyards.pt
- LinkedIn: search "nineyards"
